items.title: Luna Coffee Rebrand
items.description: A full brand refresh for a boutique coffee chain focused on modern packaging, tone of voice, and in-store visual language.
additionalInfo: Developed a modular logo and icon suite for cups, signage, and social assets.
Created a visual system balancing premium aesthetics with everyday approachability.

items.title: FinFlow Mobile App
items.description: Designed an end-to-end personal finance mobile experience with clear information hierarchy and goal-based onboarding.
additionalInfo: Reduced onboarding drop-off by simplifying the first-time flow into three guided steps.
Built reusable card, chart, and form patterns to speed product team delivery.

items.title: Aether Studio Website
items.description: A responsive portfolio website for a creative studio, emphasizing motion, readability, and project-first storytelling.
additionalInfo: Defined page rhythm and transitions to keep focus on featured projects.
Optimized layout and media strategy for faster loading on mobile devices.
